documentation:
========
datarepr
========

Visit the website `https://datarepr.johannes-programming.online <https://datarepr.johannes-programming.online>`_ for more information.

methods.name: datarepr.tests.test_0.TestDatareprFunction.test_empty_args_kwargs
documentation: Test when only the name is provided and no args or kwargs.

methods.name: datarepr.tests.test_0.TestDatareprFunction.test_mixed_args
documentation: Test with both positional and keyword arguments.

methods.name: datarepr.tests.test_0.TestDatareprFunction.test_various_types
documentation: Test with various types of arguments.

methods.name: datarepr.tests.test_0.TestDatareprFunction.test_name_as_non_string
documentation: Test with the 'name' parameter as a non-string type.

methods.name: datarepr.tests.test_0.TestDatareprFunction.test_special_characters
documentation: Test with special characters in arguments.

methods.name: datarepr.tests.test_0.TestDatareprFunction.test_large_number_of_args
documentation: Test with a large number of arguments.

methods.name: datarepr.tests.test_0.TestDatareprFunction.test_combination_of_all
documentation: Test with a complex combination of different types and structures.

methods.name: datarepr.tests.test_0.TestDatareprFunction.test_no_args_at_all
documentation: Test with no arguments, not even the name.
